overview: The design contains a single independent Go service with no dependencies, so it is implemented in a single foundational phase.

phases.name: Foundation Services
phases.description: Implement the sole backend service exposing the Todo REST API.

components.name: todo-api
responsibilities: Expose Todo REST API including PATCH /todos/{id} for idempotent completion state transitions
Enforce bearer-token authentication and owner-based authorization
Validate request content type, JSON structure, and field types with structured error responses
Maintain a thread-safe in-memory todo store with safe concurrent updates
Expose /health and Prometheus /metrics endpoints with request count, latency, and error metrics
components.architectureContext: Standalone Go HTTP service on port 9090 serving clients directly. No upstream dependencies; it is the sole backend for todo management and observability endpoints.
keyConsiderations: Use json.Decoder with DisallowUnknownFields for strict PATCH body parsing
Preserve existing completedAt on idempotent re-completion; clear when uncompleting
Per-resource locking (mutex map) or RWMutex to keep p95 latency under 300ms under concurrency
Never mutate id, owner, title, or createdAt during PATCH
Return structured {code,message,field} errors and avoid leaking internal errors on 500
components.apiContract:
openapi: 3.0.3
info:
  title: Todo API
  version: 1.0.0
  description: Todo management API with PATCH support for marking todos as completed.
servers:
  - url: http://localhost:9090
paths:
  /health:
    get:
      summary: Health check
      responses:
        '200':
          description: OK
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: object
                properties:
                  status: { type: string }
  /todos:
    get:
      summary: List todos
      security: [{ bearerAuth: [] }]
      responses:
        '200':
          description: List
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: array
                items: { $ref: '#/components/schemas/Todo' }
    post:
      summary: Create todo
      security: [{ bearerAuth: [] }]
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              type: object
              required: [title]
              properties:
                title: { type: string }
      responses:
        '201':
          description: Created
          content:
            application/json:
              schema: { $ref: '#/components/schemas/Todo' }
  /todos/{id}:
    parameters:
      - in: path
        name: id
        required: true
        schema: { type: string }
    get:
      summary: Get todo
      security: [{ bearerAuth: [] }]
      responses:
        '200':
          description: OK
          content:
            application/json:
              schema: { $ref: '#/components/schemas/Todo' }
        '404': { $ref: '#/components/responses/NotFound' }
    patch:
      summary: Mark todo completion state
      security: [{ bearerAuth: [] }]
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              type: object
              required: [completed]
              additionalProperties: false
              properties:
                completed: { type: boolean }
      responses:
        '200':
          description: Updated
          content:
            application/json:
              schema: { $ref: '#/components/schemas/Todo' }
        '400': { $ref: '#/components/responses/BadRequest' }
        '401': { $ref: '#/components/responses/Unauthorized' }
        '403': { $ref: '#/components/responses/Forbidden' }
        '404': { $ref: '#/components/responses/NotFound' }
        '415': { $ref: '#/components/responses/UnsupportedMediaType' }
        '500': { $ref: '#/components/responses/ServerError' }
  /metrics:
    get:
      summary: Prometheus metrics
      responses:
        '200':
          description: OK
          content:
            text/plain: {}
components:
  securitySchemes:
    bearerAuth:
      type: http
      scheme: bearer
  schemas:
    Todo:
      type: object
      properties:
        id: { type: string }
        title: { type: string }
        completed: { type: boolean }
        completedAt: { type: string, format: date-time, nullable: true }
        createdAt: { type: string, format: date-time }
        owner: { type: string }
    Error:
      type: object
      properties:
        code: { type: string }
        message: { type: string }
        field: { type: string }
  responses:
    BadRequest:
      description: Bad Request
      content:
        application/json:
          schema: { $ref: '#/components/schemas/Error' }
    Unauthorized:
      description: Unauthorized
      content:
        application/json:
          schema: { $ref: '#/components/schemas/Error' }
    Forbidden:
      description: Forbidden
      content:
        application/json:
          schema: { $ref: '#/components/schemas/Error' }
    NotFound:
      description: Not Found
      content:
        application/json:
          schema: { $ref: '#/components/schemas/Error' }
    UnsupportedMediaType:
      description: Unsupported Media Type
      content:
        application/json:
          schema: { $ref: '#/components/schemas/Error' }
    ServerError:
      description: Internal Server Error
      content:
        application/json:
          schema: { $ref: '#/components/schemas/Error' }
